title: Sentiment weighed down by uncertain economic backdrop
section_path: Sentiment weighed down by uncertain economic backdrop
section_path_text: Sentiment weighed down by uncertain economic backdrop
summary:
Main
A risk-off tone across markets weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. Easing geopolitical risks and burgeoning stockpiles were also headwinds. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-03 102803.png | assets/2024-05-03_sentiment-weighed-down-by-uncertain-economic-backdrop_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ac604a667d85.png
Copper started the day strongly as the USD weakened after the Fed said it was unlikely to raise rates amid persistent high inflation.
